items.prompt: Even parity bit is commonly equal to…
items.explain: Even P is the XOR (parity) of the data bits.

items.prompt: Does a single parity bit correct bit errors?
items.explain: Parity detects many single-bit errors; it does not correct them.

items.prompt: A simple multi-byte XOR checksum verifies when the fold is…
items.explain: XOR fold to zero means the check matched.

items.prompt: After a good even-parity verify, flipping one data bit should make verify FAIL.
items.explain: A single data flip changes the ones parity; check fails.
